in a preheated fryer set to ~350°F, place rice cakes in fryer basket and fry for 2-3 minutes
Cakes should be golden all around, crispy on outside but warmed and soft inside
Allow to drain excess oil over fryer, then transfer to C-Fold lined medium mixing bowl to rest
Once outside has cooled enough to touch, transfer to plate
Top the piped Spicy Tuna mix with wasabi tobiko (use oil in a squeeze bottle to help)
tobiko should go lenghtwise down the tuna
Transfer tuna to rice cakes using offset spatula; line cakes up side by side
drizzle three even lines of spicy mayo over rice cakes, then repeat with hellfire
Transfer to plate, staggering diagonally. Garnish with pansy flower
Serve immediately.
